purpose: Provide human-readable semantic compression of formally constrained accessibility dynamics.
core_compressions: Adaptive viability is the geometry of recoverable future transformational accessibility.
Viability is the rewovability of regenerative accessibility fibers.
Collapse occurs when regenerative accessibility fibers can no longer be rewoven.
Good governance opens gates without forcing convergence.
anti_drift_constraints: Do not treat interpretation as primitive substrate.
Do not infer teleology from viability dynamics.
Do not collapse metaphor into mechanism.
Do not treat phase labels as causes.
